entries.name: LLM Pulse
entries.description: LLM Pulse exposes AI visibility analytics through MCP, including projects, competitors, prompts, mentions, citations, sources, sentiment, share of voice, recommendations, GEO Writer data, Search Console, and AI traffic where plan access allows.

entries.name: Ignav Flights
entries.description: Ignav Flights gives AI agents live flight prices and working booking links. Search one-way and round-trip fares between airports; results include booking URLs. Try without an account, rate-limited per IP; use X-Api-Key for authenticated usage.

entries.name: MCP360
entries.description: MCP360 is a unified gateway and marketplace that provides 100+ external tools and custom MCPs through a single integration for AI agents.
